summary: Design unification testing completed for TA module. Backend APIs working correctly. PatternStateCard component verified with white background and readable text. Some TA components (TALayersPanel, TAExplorerPanel, DominantCard, PatternsList) not found in current UI state, likely not rendered or in different views.

design_issues.issue: Components not found in current UI state - may be in different views or not rendered

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/BTC?timeframe=4H returns valid data with Triple Top pattern
PatternStateCard component renders with white background (#ffffff)
PatternStateCard shows readable black text on white background
PatternStateCard displays Triple Top pattern with CONFLICTED state
PatternStateCard shows confidence 79%, direction bearish, action MEDIUM
PatternStateCard shows Wait Conditions with breakdown and invalidation levels
No grey backgrounds (neutral-950/80, rgba(15,23,42,0.6)) found - design unification successful
Text readability verified - all dark backgrounds have white text
